steps.title: Identify similar triangles
steps.content: Angles $PTQ$ and $RSQ$ are congruent, and angles $PQT$ and $RQS$ are vertical angles. Therefore triangles $PQT$ and $RQS$ are similar by angle-angle similarity.

steps.title: Set up the side ratio
steps.content:
Corresponding sides are proportional. Use $TQ=8{,}400$, $QS=1{,}400$, $RS=1{,}600$, and $PT=x$:
$$\frac{8{,}400}{1{,}400}=\frac{x}{1{,}600}$$

steps.title: Solve for the distance
steps.content: Simplify and solve: $$6=\frac{x}{1{,}600}$$ $$x=6(1{,}600)=9{,}600$$ The answer is 9600.
